ingredients.alim_nom_eng: Lemon, flesh without skin, without seeds, raw
Salt, white (sea, igneous or rock), iodine added, no fluride added

ingredients_text: Filets de maquereaux (Scomber scombrus) 67%, eau, aromates (citron 3,5%, oignons 2%, carottes 1%, cornichons) vinaigre de vin blanc, Muscadet 4,7%, vinaigre d'alcool, sel, sucre, arômes.
